name: Ashworth Plumbing & Heating

strengths.title: Gas Safe & 4.8★
strengths.detail: Strong review base, clear trust signals.

weaknesses.title: No instant response
weaknesses.detail: Emergency leaks at night hit voicemail.

weaknesses.title: No online booking
weaknesses.detail: Every service booked by phone tag.

painPoints: Emergency calls missed overnight and weekends
Owner on the tools can't answer mid-job
Boiler quotes go cold without follow-up
Admin overload booking services around jobs

aiReceptionist.greeting: Thanks for calling Ashworth Plumbing & Heating, how can I help?
aiReceptionist.tone: Calm, reassuring Mancunian tradesman. Especially steady with panicked emergency callers.
aiReceptionist.emergencyRule: If the caller has a burst pipe, major leak, or no heating/hot water in winter, treat as EMERGENCY: reassure, give immediate stop-tap guidance, capture address, and alert the on-call engineer instantly.
qualifyingQuestions: What's the plumbing or heating issue?
Is water actively leaking right now?
Best number to call straight back?

faqs.a: Yes — 24/7 for leaks, bursts and no-heating emergencies across Greater Manchester.
Yes, fully Gas Safe registered and insured. We issue certificates on completion.

faqs.q: Do you do landlord gas certificates?
faqs.a: Yes — CP12s for single properties and portfolios, with reminders before renewal.

leads.name: Sarah T.
leads.summary: Old boiler unreliable, wants a combi replacement in a 3-bed semi. Ready to book a survey — strong intent.

leads.name: Miller Lettings
leads.summary: Letting agent needs CP12s across 6 properties with annual renewals. Recurring contract opportunity.

leads.name: G. Owens
leads.summary: Homeowner wants a full bathroom refit including tiling. High-value job, comparing quotes.

leads.name: D. Price
leads.summary: Burst pipe under the kitchen sink, water spreading. AI gave stop-tap guidance and dispatched on-call engineer.

demo.urgentLine: Burst pipes and no-heating calls jump the queue with instant stop-tap guidance + on-call alert.
demo.reviewQuote: Boiler died on the coldest night — Ashworth answered at 11pm and had us warm again by lunch. Superb.

sampleLead.name: Sarah T.
sampleLead.summary: Old boiler unreliable, wants a combi replacement in a 3-bed semi. Ready to book a survey — strong buying intent.
sampleLead.recommendedAction: Call back after 6pm to book a survey; quote combi swap with finance option — strong close.

messages.text: Hi Sarah, it's Ashworth Plumbing 🔧 We can survey your new boiler Thu 5–6pm or Sat AM — which suits?
Booked for Thursday 5:30pm. I'll text a reminder that morning 👍

meetingBrief.summary: Ashworth Plumbing & Heating — Gas Safe, Manchester, 4.8★ (143 reviews). Already offers emergency call-out but misses overnight calls. Est. £27k/mo recoverable.
meetingBrief.decisionMaker: James Ashworth (owner) — hands-on engineer, likely values time-saved over tech.
meetingBrief.bestAngle: Overnight/weekend emergency capture + boiler-quote follow-up. They already sell "24/7" but can't answer 24/7 — close that gap.
objections: "We already do emergencies" → but who answers at 2am mid-job? AI does, every time.
"Customers want to talk to a person" → AI reassures and books the engineer faster.
"Another monthly bill" → one recovered boiler install covers a year.
discoveryQuestions: How many emergency calls come in out-of-hours?
What happens to a call at 10pm?
How many boiler quotes go cold?
Who does the CP12 admin and reminders?
mention: They advertise 24/7 but miss overnight calls

opportunities.title: 24/7 AI reception
opportunities.detail: Answer every call, form and message instantly — including nights and weekends.

opportunities.title: Instant qualification
opportunities.detail: Score and scope every job before it reaches the owner.

opportunities.title: Automated quote chasing
opportunities.detail: Recover work that currently goes quiet after the first quote.
